'''ây-g-m-n''' ('''kayagmenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vang|vang]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vang|vang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-g-m-n
|-
! Lemma
| kayagmenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyagmenoko|thiyagmenoko]] || [[word:jiyagmenoko|jiyagmenoko]] || [[word:shiyagmenoko|shiyagmenoko]] || [[word:kiyagmenoko|kiyagmenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyagmenoko|thĂŠyagmenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyagmenoko|jĂŠyagmenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyagmenoko|shĂŠyagmenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyagmenoko|kĂŠyagmenoko]]
|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
